description: Everyone remember the Pubby? It was a nice little compact ship with an old style mining redemption machine that people would hop on and create mining colonies with the unlimited shelter pods that invited its colonizers to stay and the ship to fly out into space and bring in points/supplies and create a nice unique little mining colony world with its own economy and community that worked without research and development which invited outsiders to bring in what it lacked. It also lacked medical supplies until you got points to use its medipens, causing brain damage or, if it was here today, would need external medical surgery tools. You had to be creative and come up with clever unique solutions to problems that the Pubby had. This made it fun to play it, as opposed to playing a ship with everything on it. People rarely played the pubby then. And, when it was played, it was entertaining at least if people knew what they were doing. Once that old style mining redemption machine got removed and no way to get research to make a cargo board to buy more supplies, no one played it because there was nothing advantageous about it. So, the devs decided that to fix it they would make it bigger and give them a cargo lathe. End result? No one plays Pubby, because they can just play solgov Cricket or some other ship with actual research and weaponry. Another ship, sterilized. Another ship unplayed.
